summary: Iteration 16 verified all 3 reported user issues are fixed: (1) Settings button removed from board page toolbar, (2) Board invite rejects unregistered emails with proper 400 error, (3) User dropdown contains all 5 functions with correct testids and red-styled Log out. Backend pytest 3/3 PASS. Frontend Playwright fully verified: no Settings button on board page (confirmed via screenshot showing toolbar = Export/Invite/Share with Team/Activity/Add Column/Add Group/...), all 5 dropdown items present (menu-my-profile, menu-administration, menu-teams, menu-import, menu-logout) with proper labels, Log out is text-red-600, navigation works for all items (My profile->/settings, Administration->/settings, Teams->/workspaces/{id}/team, Import data->/workspaces/{id}/import, Log out->/login).
critical_code_review_comments: board_routes.py invite_to_board: 'email' is a query parameter (not request body). Frontend callers must pass it as ?email=... — this is an unusual REST design for a POST endpoint. Consider switching to a Pydantic body model for consistency, but functionally working.

board_routes.py invite_to_board: returns generic 400 'not registered' message which is correct, but does not differentiate from other 400 errors. Consider adding an error code field for the frontend to reliably show the precise UI.
Sidebar.jsx: 'Teams' dropdown item navigates to /workspaces/{id}/team only when currentWorkspace is set, otherwise falls back to /settings — minor UX inconsistency but acceptable.

Email integration is MOCKED — no RESEND_API_KEY/SENDGRID_API_KEY configured. Board invite still adds the user to member_ids and creates in-app notifications, so functional flow works without real emails.
auth_routes.py 'delete-by-domain' endpoint (flagged in iter 15) remains unauthenticated and destructive — should be removed before production.
seed_data_creation: None — re-invited user2 to existing pipeline board (idempotent, member_ids unchanged after first add).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 green. Board invite endpoint takes email as QUERY param (?email=...), not body. User dropdown trigger is the user avatar/name button at bottom of sidebar; opens with side='top'. Menu testids: menu-my-profile, menu-administration, menu-teams, menu-import, menu-logout. Pipeline board id: 80443bd5-2839-4909-955b-e13157def5eb. Board toolbar now has 6 visible buttons + a context menu (...): Export, Invite, Share with Team, Activity, Add Column, Add Group.
